questionEdit.editedStem: REAL011 修订后题干：已调整题干、分值、难度和来源框。

rollback: delete from review_queue_items where payload->>'questionItemId' = 'dc89d108-7d6b-4635-b0e6-aef338d60c30' or payload->>'sourceRegionId' = '083e99e8-34d8-4d03-b853-3afb6754f89a'; delete from question_blocks where question_item_id = 'dc89d108-7d6b-4635-b0e6-aef338d60c30'; delete from question_items where id = 'dc89d108-7d6b-4635-b0e6-aef338d60c30';
summaryChinese: 题干、答案、解析、题型、分值、难度和 SourceRegion bbox 均可修订，且题目与来源框修订都有 audit。
